title: Component Metadata
description: Machine-readable component metadata for AI agents, documentation tools, and design system consumers. Describes intent, composition rules, variant logic, relationships, and accessibility — not just props and visuals.

name.description: PascalCase component name matching the SCSS file (e.g. 'Button' for _button.scss)

description.description: One-paragraph summary of the component's role in the design system

intent.description: Why this component exists — the problem it solves and when to reach for it

purpose.description: One sentence: what problem does this component solve for the user?

task_context.description: Scenarios where this component is the right choice (e.g. 'form submission', 'destructive confirmation')

sentiment.description: Emotional tones the component can carry (e.g. 'urgency', 'neutral', 'reassurance')

composition.description: What elements MUST, CAN, and MUST NOT appear inside this component

requires.description: Elements that MUST be present (e.g. 'label text')

allows.description: Elements that CAN be present (e.g. 'leading icon', 'trailing icon')

forbids.description: Elements that MUST NOT be present (e.g. 'nested interactive elements')

variants.description: Decision logic for each variant — when to use it, when to avoid it, and what pairs well

use_when.description: The scenario where this variant is the right choice

avoid_when.description: The scenario where this variant is wrong — what to use instead

pair_with.description: Components or elements that work well alongside this variant

context.description: Environmental conditions that affect how the component renders or behaves

relationships.description: How this component connects to other components in the system

related.description: Components with overlapping purpose — agents should consider these alternatives

escalates_to.description: What this component upgrades to for heavier or more complex flows

degrades_to.description: What replaces this component in simpler or more constrained contexts

groups_with.description: Container or layout components this typically lives inside

observability.description: What to track in analytics and what signals indicate healthy usage

health.description: Metrics that signal the component is being used correctly (e.g. 'primary variant used <=1 per view')

accessibility.description: ARIA semantics, keyboard interaction, and screen reader behavior

role.description: The ARIA role this component maps to (e.g. 'button', 'dialog', 'tablist')

wai_aria_pattern.description: Link to the WAI-ARIA Authoring Practices Guide pattern

announces.description: What the screen reader announces for this component (e.g. 'button label + loading state')
